docs.title: C0 Architecture
key_findings: Layered orchestration: Service → Registry → Orchestrator → Pipeline
10 orchestrators with orchestration-only invariant
TDA pipeline: Phase-2 (3+1 passes) → Phase-3 (4 passes) → Phase-3.5
CQEOrchestrator identified as highest-energy symbol (forward_mag: 43.9)

docs.title: C0 Data Flow
key_findings: 4 major data flows: scan, CQE query, TDA pipeline, orchestrator sub-flows
Pipeline state passed via intermediate JSONL files
Adapter pattern: all I/O delegated to injected adapters
Cross-center flow map with persistence locations

docs.title: C0 API Surface
key_findings: 3 entry points (all TRANSIENT, low forward magnitude)
6 service classes with method signatures
11 orchestrator classes documented
Full method signatures for all public symbols

docs.title: C0 Dependencies
key_findings: Internal dependency graph fully mapped
SC70 tight-coupling cluster identified (C0+C1+C3+C7+C8 = 832 symbols)
Adapter boundary contracts mapped for all 10 orchestrators

docs.title: C0 Entry Points
key_findings: QuroV3Service::service::81 is the primary MCP entry (TRANSIENT, fwd:0.54)
enrich::types::55 is a legacy CLI entry (leaf, fwd:0.0)
get_all_nodes::memory::108 is a data access entry (TRANSIENT, fwd:0.54)
True high-energy symbols are internal orchestrators (CQE:43.9, Phantom:29.6)
